# AUTO-GENERATED by gen_law_consistency.py - do not edit manually
# See the script header for the algorithm and output contract.

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_governance_principles = {
	# Active: law_monarchy  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				country_is_colonial_or_company = yes
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_colonial_administration
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
					has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_neocameralism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_colonial_administration  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_colonial_administration
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
					has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_neocameralism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_monarchy
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_parliamentary_republic  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_autocracy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_presidential_republic
		}
	}

	# Active: law_theocracy  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_total_separation
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
					has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_neocameralism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				country_is_colonial_or_company = yes
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_colonial_administration
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_monarchy
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_neocameralism  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_neocameralism
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
					has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				country_is_colonial_or_company = yes
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_colonial_administration
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_monarchy
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_total_separation
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_theocracy
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_direct_democracy  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_direct_democracy
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_single_party_state
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_corporate_state
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_distribution_of_power = {
	# Active: law_autocracy  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_autocracy
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				c:JAP ?= this
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_bakufu
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				c:AUS ?= this
				has_global_variable = neo_absolutism_victory
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_neo_absolutism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_oligarchy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_bakufu  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_bakufu
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				c:AUS ?= this
				has_global_variable = neo_absolutism_victory
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_neo_absolutism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_autocracy
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian
				is_subject = yes
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_organic_regulation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_oligarchy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_neo_absolutism  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_neo_absolutism
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				c:JAP ?= this
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_bakufu
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_autocracy
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian
				is_subject = yes
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_organic_regulation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_oligarchy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_elder_council  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_elder_council
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian
				is_subject = yes
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_organic_regulation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_algorithmic_governance
		}
	}

	# Active: law_landed_voting  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_elder_council
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian
				is_subject = yes
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_organic_regulation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_algorithmic_governance
		}
	}

	# Active: law_wealth_voting  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_algorithmic_governance
		}
	}

	# Active: law_census_voting  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_single_party_state
		}
	}

	# Active: law_universal_suffrage  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_census_voting
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_single_party_state
		}
	}

	# Active: law_anarchy  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_cooperative_ownership
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_census_voting
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_single_party_state
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_economic_system = {
	# Active: law_traditionalism  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_per_capita_based_taxation
				has_law = law_type:law_proportional_taxation
				has_law = law_type:law_graduated_taxation
				has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_extraction_economy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_interventionism  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
				has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
				has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_isolationism
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_guild_system
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_autocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_neo_absolutism
					has_law = law_type:law_oligarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_organic_regulation
					has_law = law_type:law_single_party_state
					has_law = law_type:law_technocracy
				}
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_command_economy
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_per_capita_based_taxation
					has_law = law_type:law_proportional_taxation
					has_law = law_type:law_graduated_taxation
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_extraction_economy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_agrarianism  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
				has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_interventionism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_isolationism
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_guild_system
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_per_capita_based_taxation
					has_law = law_type:law_proportional_taxation
					has_law = law_type:law_graduated_taxation
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_extraction_economy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_industry_banned  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_extraction_economy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_laissez_faire  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
				has_law = law_type:law_isolationism
				has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				has_law = law_type:law_guild_system
				has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
				has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_interventionism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_autocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_neo_absolutism
					has_law = law_type:law_oligarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_organic_regulation
					has_law = law_type:law_single_party_state
					has_law = law_type:law_technocracy
				}
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_command_economy
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_extraction_economy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_cooperative_ownership  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_cooperative_ownership
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
					has_law = law_type:law_corporate_state
				}
				has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
				has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_autocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_neo_absolutism
					has_law = law_type:law_oligarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_organic_regulation
					has_law = law_type:law_single_party_state
					has_law = law_type:law_technocracy
				}
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_command_economy
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_interventionism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_isolationism
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_guild_system
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_extraction_economy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_command_economy  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_autocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_neo_absolutism
					has_law = law_type:law_oligarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_organic_regulation
					has_law = law_type:law_single_party_state
					has_law = law_type:law_technocracy
				}
				has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
				has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_interventionism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_isolationism
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_guild_system
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
					has_law = law_type:law_corporate_state
				}
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_cooperative_ownership
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
					has_law = law_type:law_women_in_the_fields
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_factory_councils
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_extraction_economy
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_citizenship = {
	# Active: law_subjecthood  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_subjecthood
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
		}
	}

	# Active: law_multicultural  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_slavery_banned
				}
				has_law = law_type:law_no_ministry_of_refugee_affairs
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_church_and_state = {
	# Active: law_millet_system  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_millet_system
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				country_is_islamic = yes
				NOT = { c:TUR ?= this }
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_people_of_the_book
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_state_religion
		}
	}

	# Active: law_people_of_the_book  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_people_of_the_book
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				c:TUR ?= this
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_millet_system
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_state_religion
		}
	}

	# Active: law_freedom_of_conscience  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_freedom_of_conscience
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				c:TUR ?= this
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_millet_system
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				country_is_islamic = yes
				NOT = { c:TUR ?= this }
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_people_of_the_book
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_total_separation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_state_religion
		}
	}

	# Active: law_total_separation  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_total_separation
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_state_atheism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_freedom_of_conscience
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				c:TUR ?= this
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_millet_system
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				country_is_islamic = yes
				NOT = { c:TUR ?= this }
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_people_of_the_book
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_state_religion
		}
	}

	# Active: law_state_atheism  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_state_atheism
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_total_separation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_freedom_of_conscience
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				c:TUR ?= this
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_millet_system
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				country_is_islamic = yes
				NOT = { c:TUR ?= this }
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
					has_law = law_type:law_chiefdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_people_of_the_book
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_state_religion
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_bureaucracy = {
	# Active: law_hereditary_bureaucrats  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_hereditary_bureaucrats
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					c:AUS ?= this
					AND = {
						exists = c:AUS
						is_subject_of = c:AUS
					}
				}
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_crownland_diets
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_appointed_bureaucrats
		}
	}

	# Active: law_crownland_diets  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_crownland_diets
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_hereditary_bureaucrats
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_appointed_bureaucrats
		}
	}

	# Active: law_elected_bureaucrats  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_elected_bureaucrats
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
				has_law = law_type:law_technocracy
				has_law = law_type:law_elder_council
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_appointed_bureaucrats
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_army_model = {
	# Active: law_professional_army  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_professional_army
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_strict_edo_system
				has_law = law_type:law_intermediate_edo_system
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_strict_edo_system
					has_law = law_type:law_intermediate_edo_system
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_national_militia
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_private_military_contractors
		}
	}

	# Active: law_national_militia  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_national_militia
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_strict_edo_system
				has_law = law_type:law_intermediate_edo_system
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_strict_edo_system
					has_law = law_type:law_intermediate_edo_system
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_professional_army
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_private_military_contractors
		}
	}

	# Active: law_mass_conscription  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_mass_conscription
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_strict_edo_system
				has_law = law_type:law_intermediate_edo_system
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_private_military_contractors
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_internal_security = {
	# Active: law_shinsengumi  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_shinsengumi
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_bakufu
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_secret_police
		}
	}

	# Active: law_guaranteed_liberties  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_guaranteed_liberties
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_right_of_assembly
					has_law = law_type:law_protected_speech
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_national_guard
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_trade_policy = {
	# Active: law_free_trade  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_free_trade
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_protectionism
		}
	}

	# Active: law_isolationism  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_isolationism
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_primary_culture = { has_discrimination_trait = heritage_han }
				any_scope_state = { state_region = s:STATE_GUANGDONG is_largest_state_in_region = yes }
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_canton_system
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				country_has_primary_culture = cu:japanese
				any_scope_state = { state_region = s:STATE_KYUSHU is_largest_state_in_region = yes }
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_sakoku
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_mercantilism
		}
	}

	# Active: law_canton_system  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_canton_system
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				country_has_primary_culture = cu:japanese
				any_scope_state = { state_region = s:STATE_KYUSHU is_largest_state_in_region = yes }
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_sakoku
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_isolationism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_mercantilism
		}
	}

	# Active: law_sakoku  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_sakoku
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_primary_culture = { has_discrimination_trait = heritage_han }
				any_scope_state = { state_region = s:STATE_GUANGDONG is_largest_state_in_region = yes }
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_canton_system
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_isolationism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_mercantilism
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_taxation = {
	# Active: law_per_capita_based_taxation  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_per_capita_based_taxation
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_proportional_taxation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_land_based_taxation
		}
	}

	# Active: law_proportional_taxation  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_proportional_taxation
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_graduated_taxation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_per_capita_based_taxation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_land_based_taxation
		}
	}

	# Active: law_graduated_taxation  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_graduated_taxation
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_proportional_taxation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_per_capita_based_taxation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_land_based_taxation
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_land_reform = {
	# Active: law_serfdom  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
				has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
				has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					c:AUS ?= this
					AND = {
						exists = c:AUS
						is_subject_of = c:AUS
						OR = {
							is_subject_type = subject_type_crown_land
							is_subject_type = subject_type_personal_union
						}
						c:AUS ?= { has_law = law_type:law_manorialism }
					}
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_manorialism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				any_primary_culture = { OR = {
					has_discrimination_trait = language_hispanophone
					has_discrimination_trait = language_lusophone
					has_discrimination_trait = language_italian
				} }
				hidden_trigger = { NOT = { has_variable = upgraded_latifundias_law_var } }
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_latifundias
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				any_primary_culture = { OR = {
					has_discrimination_trait = language_hispanophone
					has_discrimination_trait = language_lusophone
					has_discrimination_trait = language_italian
				} }
				hidden_trigger = { has_variable = upgraded_latifundias_law_var }
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_expanded_latifundias
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_tenant_farmers
		}
	}

	# Active: law_latifundias  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_latifundias
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_primary_culture = { OR = {
					has_discrimination_trait = language_hispanophone
					has_discrimination_trait = language_lusophone
					has_discrimination_trait = language_italian
				} }
				hidden_trigger = { has_variable = upgraded_latifundias_law_var }
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_expanded_latifundias
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					c:AUS ?= this
					AND = {
						exists = c:AUS
						is_subject_of = c:AUS
						OR = {
							is_subject_type = subject_type_crown_land
							is_subject_type = subject_type_personal_union
						}
						c:AUS ?= { has_law = law_type:law_manorialism }
					}
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_manorialism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_tenant_farmers
		}
	}

	# Active: law_expanded_latifundias  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_expanded_latifundias
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_primary_culture = { OR = {
					has_discrimination_trait = language_hispanophone
					has_discrimination_trait = language_lusophone
					has_discrimination_trait = language_italian
				} }
				hidden_trigger = { NOT = { has_variable = upgraded_latifundias_law_var } }
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_latifundias
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					c:AUS ?= this
					AND = {
						exists = c:AUS
						is_subject_of = c:AUS
						OR = {
							is_subject_type = subject_type_crown_land
							is_subject_type = subject_type_personal_union
						}
						c:AUS ?= { has_law = law_type:law_manorialism }
					}
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_manorialism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_tenant_farmers
		}
	}

	# Active: law_commercialized_agriculture  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_commercialized_agriculture
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					country_is_colonial_or_company = yes
					capital ?= { is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_new_world }
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_homesteading
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_peasant_proprietorship
		}
	}

	# Active: law_collectivized_agriculture  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_collectivized_agriculture
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
					has_law = law_type:law_cooperative_ownership
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_peasant_proprietorship
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_colonization = {
	# Active: law_frontier_colonization  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_frontier_colonization
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_sakoku
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_sakoku
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_colonial_resettlement
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_colonial_affairs
		}
	}

	# Active: law_colonial_resettlement  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_colonial_resettlement
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_sakoku
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_sakoku
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_frontier_colonization
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_colonial_affairs
		}
	}

	# Active: law_colonial_exploitation  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_colonial_exploitation
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_sakoku
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_neocolonialism
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_education_system = {
	# Active: law_no_schools  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_no_schools
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_compulsory_primary_school
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_total_separation
					has_law = law_type:law_state_atheism
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_religious_schools
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				c:JAP ?= this
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_terakoya
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_private_schools
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_public_schools
		}
	}

	# Active: law_religious_schools  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_religious_schools
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_total_separation
				has_law = law_type:law_state_atheism
				has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				c:JAP ?= this
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_terakoya
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_compulsory_primary_school
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_schools
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_private_schools
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_public_schools
		}
	}

	# Active: law_private_schools  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_private_schools
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				c:JAP ?= this
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_terakoya
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_public_schools
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_total_separation
					has_law = law_type:law_state_atheism
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_religious_schools
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_compulsory_primary_school
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_schools
		}
	}

	# Active: law_public_schools  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_public_schools
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
				has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_private_schools
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				c:JAP ?= this
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_terakoya
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_total_separation
					has_law = law_type:law_state_atheism
					has_law = law_type:law_serfdom
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_religious_schools
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_compulsory_primary_school
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_schools
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_migration = {
	# Active: law_no_migration_controls  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_no_migration_controls
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_sakoku
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_sakoku
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_migration_controls
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_closed_borders
		}
	}

	# Active: law_migration_controls  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_migration_controls
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_sakoku
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_closed_borders
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_labour_associations = {
	# Active: law_guild_system  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_guild_system
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_corporatized_unions
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_childrens_rights = {
	# Active: law_compulsory_primary_school  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_compulsory_primary_school
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_no_schools
				has_law = law_type:law_terakoya
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_restricted_child_labor
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_rights_of_women = {
	# Active: law_womens_suffrage  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_womens_suffrage
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_single_party_state
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_protected_class
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_slavery = {
	# Active: law_debt_slavery  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_debt_slavery
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
				has_law = law_type:law_affirmative_action
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
					has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
					has_law = law_type:law_affirmative_action
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_slave_trade
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_slave_trade
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_legacy_slavery
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_colonial_slavery
		}
	}

	# Active: law_slave_trade  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_slave_trade
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
				has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
				has_law = law_type:law_affirmative_action
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
					has_law = law_type:law_affirmative_action
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_debt_slavery
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_slave_trade
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_legacy_slavery
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_colonial_slavery
		}
	}

	# Active: law_legacy_slavery  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_legacy_slavery
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_slave_trade
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_colonial_slavery
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_caste_hegemony = {
	# Active: law_affirmative_action  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_affirmative_action
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_slavery_banned
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_hindu_caste_not_enforced
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_minority_rights = {
	# Active: law_minority_rights_violent_hostility  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_violent_hostility
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_ethnostate
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_subjecthood
					has_law = law_type:law_ethnostate
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_ghettoization
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_subjecthood
					has_law = law_type:law_ethnostate
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_discrimination
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
					has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_cultural_assimilation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_indifference
		}
	}

	# Active: law_minority_rights_ghettoization  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_ghettoization
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_subjecthood
					has_law = law_type:law_ethnostate
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_ethnostate
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_violent_hostility
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_subjecthood
					has_law = law_type:law_ethnostate
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_discrimination
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
					has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_cultural_assimilation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_indifference
		}
	}

	# Active: law_minority_rights_cultural_assimilation  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_cultural_assimilation
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
					has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_subjecthood
					has_law = law_type:law_ethnostate
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_discrimination
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_indifference
		}
	}

	# Active: law_minority_rights_discrimination  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_discrimination
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_subjecthood
					has_law = law_type:law_ethnostate
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
					has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_cultural_assimilation
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_indifference
		}
	}

	# Active: law_minority_rights_protection  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_protection
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
					has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_indifference
		}
	}

	# Active: law_minority_rights_affirmative_action  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_affirmative_action
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
					has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_national_supremacy
					has_law = law_type:law_racial_segregation
					has_law = law_type:law_cultural_exclusion
					has_law = law_type:law_multicultural
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_protection
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_indifference
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_intellectual_property = {
	# Active: law_state_intellectual_property  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_state_intellectual_property
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
					has_law = law_type:law_corporate_state
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_traditional_ip_protection
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_monetary_policy = {
	# Active: law_fiat_currency  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_fiat_currency
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_national_bank
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_decentralized_cryptocurrency
		}
	}

	# Active: law_digital_currency  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_digital_currency
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_national_bank
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_decentralized_cryptocurrency
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_inheritance = {
	# Active: law_non_inheritable_usage_rights  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_non_inheritable_usage_rights
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
					has_law = law_type:law_cooperative_ownership
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_equal_inheritance
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_human_augmentation = {
	# Active: law_no_augmentation  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_no_augmentation
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_unrestricted_augmentation
				has_law = law_type:law_human_purity
				has_law = law_type:law_medical_augmentation_only
				has_law = law_type:law_regulated_augmentation_market
				has_law = law_type:law_mandatory_augmentation
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_charitable_health_system
					has_law = law_type:law_private_health_insurance
					has_law = law_type:law_public_health_insurance
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_medical_augmentation_only
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_unrestricted_augmentation
		}
	}

	# Active: law_medical_augmentation_only  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_medical_augmentation_only
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_charitable_health_system
					has_law = law_type:law_private_health_insurance
					has_law = law_type:law_public_health_insurance
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_unrestricted_augmentation
		}
	}

	# Active: law_regulated_augmentation_market  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_regulated_augmentation_market
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_ministry_of_consumer_protection
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_charitable_health_system
					has_law = law_type:law_private_health_insurance
					has_law = law_type:law_public_health_insurance
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_medical_augmentation_only
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_unrestricted_augmentation
		}
	}

	# Active: law_mandatory_augmentation  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_mandatory_augmentation
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_ministry_of_war
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_human_purity
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_genetic_rights = {
	# Active: law_traditional_heredity  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_traditional_heredity
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_ban_on_genetic_modification
				has_law = law_type:law_corporate_genetic_licensing
				has_law = law_type:law_open_source_genetics
				has_law = law_type:law_state_eugenics_program
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_state_eugenics_program
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_language_policy = {
	# Active: law_civic_monolingualism  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_civic_monolingualism
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_no_schools
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_ethnostate
					has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_violent_hostility
					has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_ghettoization
					has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_cultural_assimilation
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_multilingual_federalism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_local_vernacular
		}
	}

	# Active: law_multilingual_federalism  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_multilingual_federalism
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_ethnostate
				has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_violent_hostility
				has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_ghettoization
				has_law = law_type:law_minority_rights_cultural_assimilation
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_no_schools
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_civic_monolingualism
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_ubiquitous_translation
		}
	}

	# Active: law_state_led_language_reform  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_state_led_language_reform
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_no_schools
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_ubiquitous_translation
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_antitrust = {
	# Active: law_guilds_chartered_monopolies  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_guilds_chartered_monopolies
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
					has_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
					has_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
					has_law = law_type:law_guild_system
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
					has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
					has_law = law_type:law_extraction_economy
					has_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
					has_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_freedom_of_contract
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
					has_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_dirigisme
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_trust_busting
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_regulated_utilities
		}
	}

	# Active: law_freedom_of_contract  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_freedom_of_contract
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
					has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
					has_law = law_type:law_extraction_economy
					has_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
					has_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
					has_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_dirigisme
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
					has_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
					has_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
					has_law = law_type:law_guild_system
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_guilds_chartered_monopolies
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_trust_busting
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_regulated_utilities
		}
	}

	# Active: law_trust_busting  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_trust_busting
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
				has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
					has_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_dirigisme
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_regulated_utilities
		}
	}

	# Active: law_dirigisme  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_dirigisme
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				has_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
					has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
					has_law = law_type:law_extraction_economy
					has_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
					has_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_freedom_of_contract
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_trust_busting
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
					has_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
					has_law = law_type:law_industry_banned
					has_law = law_type:law_guild_system
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_guilds_chartered_monopolies
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_regulated_utilities
		}
	}

	# Active: law_command_cooperative_economy  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_command_cooperative_economy
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
					has_law = law_type:law_cooperative_ownership
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_regulated_utilities
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_financial_regulation = {
	# Active: law_unregulated_banking  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_unregulated_banking
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_free_mutual_banking
		}
	}

	# Active: law_directed_credit_development_banks  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_directed_credit_development_banks
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
				has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
				}
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
					has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_state_owned_banking
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_prudential_narrow_banking
		}
	}

	# Active: law_state_owned_banking  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_state_owned_banking
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
				}
				has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
				has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_directed_credit_development_banks
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_national_bank
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_central_bank_independence
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_prudential_narrow_banking
		}
	}

	# Active: law_central_bank_independence  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_central_bank_independence
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_national_bank
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
				}
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
					has_law = law_type:law_interventionism
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_state_owned_banking
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_laissez_faire
					has_law = law_type:law_command_economy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_directed_credit_development_banks
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_prudential_narrow_banking
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_internet_governance = {
	# Active: law_no_internet_policy  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_no_internet_policy
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_unregulated_internet
				has_law = law_type:law_state_controlled_internet
				has_law = law_type:law_net_neutrality
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_state_controlled_internet
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_privacy_rights = {
	# Active: law_strong_privacy_rights  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_strong_privacy_rights
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_guaranteed_liberties
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_moderate_data_privacy
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_electoral_finance = {
	# Active: law_no_campaign_finance_laws  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_no_campaign_finance_laws
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
				has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
				has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
				has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
				has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_unregulated_donations
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_donation_limits
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_publicly_funded_elections
		}
	}

	# Active: law_unregulated_donations  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_unregulated_donations
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_campaign_finance_laws
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_donation_limits
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_publicly_funded_elections
		}
	}

	# Active: law_donation_limits  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_donation_limits
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_campaign_finance_laws
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_unregulated_donations
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_publicly_funded_elections
		}
	}

	# Active: law_publicly_funded_elections  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_publicly_funded_elections
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_donation_limits
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_campaign_finance_laws
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_landed_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_wealth_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_census_voting
					has_law = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					has_law = law_type:law_anarchy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_unregulated_donations
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_national_bank = {
	# Active: law_national_bank  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_national_bank
			OR = {
				has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_national_bank
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_ministry_of_refugee_affairs = {
	# Active: law_ministry_of_refugee_affairs  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_ministry_of_refugee_affairs
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_no_migration_controls
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_ministry_of_refugee_affairs
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_ministry_of_propaganda = {
	# Active: law_ministry_of_propaganda  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_ministry_of_propaganda
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_single_party_state
					has_law = law_type:law_secret_police
					has_law = law_type:law_outlawed_dissent
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_ministry_of_propaganda
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_ministry_of_thought_control = {
	# Active: law_ministry_of_thought_control  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_ministry_of_thought_control
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_single_party_state
					has_law = law_type:law_secret_police
					has_law = law_type:law_outlawed_dissent
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_ministry_of_thought_control
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_ministry_of_consumer_protection = {
	# Active: law_ministry_of_consumer_protection  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_ministry_of_consumer_protection
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_regulatory_bodies
					has_law = law_type:law_worker_protections
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_ministry_of_consumer_protection
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_ministry_of_religion = {
	# Active: law_ministry_of_religion  ->  detect violation, cascade replacements
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_ministry_of_religion
			OR = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
					has_law = law_type:law_freedom_of_conscience
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { always = yes }
			activate_law = law_type:law_no_ministry_of_religion
		}
	}

}

te_fix_inconsistent_laws = {
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_governance_principles = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_distribution_of_power = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_economic_system = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_citizenship = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_church_and_state = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_bureaucracy = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_army_model = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_internal_security = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_trade_policy = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_taxation = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_land_reform = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_colonization = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_education_system = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_migration = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_labour_associations = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_childrens_rights = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_rights_of_women = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_slavery = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_caste_hegemony = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_minority_rights = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_intellectual_property = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_monetary_policy = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_inheritance = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_human_augmentation = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_genetic_rights = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_language_policy = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_antitrust = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_financial_regulation = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_internet_governance = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_privacy_rights = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_electoral_finance = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_national_bank = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_ministry_of_refugee_affairs = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_ministry_of_propaganda = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_ministry_of_thought_control = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_ministry_of_consumer_protection = yes
	te_fix_inconsistent_lawgroup_ministry_of_religion = yes
}
